messages.content: Please look into this document and create a summary of 1 paragraph and total costs.

The document outlines Crannull’s phased AI implementation plan prepared by DBWD, aimed at improving efficiency through automation, data handling, and content generation tools [1]. Stage 1, already completed, established a secure AI portal (ai.crannull.co.uk) for consistent, brand‑aligned content production and includes refinements to improve reliability and unify multiple assistants into one. Stage 2 focuses on integrating tools for data manipulation, exporting structured outputs, and syncing live documents from SharePoint/OneDrive for real‑time access and processing, with an estimated development time of 3 weeks plus 1 week of testing. Future stages propose advanced integrations such as CRM linking, AI‑based data cleansing, call transcription summaries, and performance analysis to further enhance business intelligence and automation capabilities.  

**Total Costs:**  
- Stage 1: £1,600 (one‑off)  
- Stage 2: £2,000 (one‑off)  
- Future Stages: To Be Confirmed (TBC)  
**Total (confirmed): £3,600** [1]
